phases.name: Feature Audit
phases.description: Read all source files, catalog every feature, and produce FEATURES.md

subtasks.description: Audit server-side features: read every file in server/src/ (routes, ai, telegram, auth, cards, ws, db) and catalog all implemented features with their locations and status

verification.run: Confirm all server source files are accounted for in the audit notes

subtasks.description: Audit web-side features and produce FEATURES.md: read every file in web/src/ (components, api, auth, ws, App, MirrorView), then combine server + web audit into a structured FEATURES.md at the project root. Cross-reference against README.md to ensure nothing is missed.

verification.run: cat FEATURES.md and verify all source files and README features are covered
